Explanation: After reviewing the peer agents' answers and the evidence, all agents agree that while the article "The Role of European Starlings (Sturnus vulgaris) in the Dissemination of Multidrug-Resistant Escherichia coli among Concentrated Animal Feeding Operations" [82885] matches the description for the E. coli dissemination article (2019–2023, U.S. government affiliation), there is no direct evidence of a COVID-19 article (2018–2023) with the specified author profile or its title in the search results. Therefore, I concur with the consensus.
Exact Answer: Not found in current evidence
Confidence: 40%
